text:
Market today: Tech is getting hit again — AI names specifically are under pressure, and that's exactly your lane. Margin accounts feel this faster and harder than cash accounts. Quad witching Friday (massive options/futures expiration) means wild volume swings today — moves can be exaggerated and misleading.

Your holdings: Three need eyes right now. PLTR is down -17.56% and already flagged SELL — it's bleeding and hasn't found a floor. AVGO is your largest position, down -13.18% and flagged TRIM — with AI stocks tumbling today, this one faces direct sector headwind. SPAL is down -16.49% — it's a 2x leveraged SpaceX ETF and SpaceX-related names are getting crushed today per the headlines; decay plus leverage plus a bad tape is a brutal combo. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited data — treat it like it can gap 20% either way. Margin amplifies every one of these drops.

Watch: How AI/chip names close today given the expiration-day volume. SPAL and SPCX into the close given the SpaceX selloff headline.

Bottom line: Your three biggest pain points — PLTR, AVGO, SPAL — all have sector winds in their face today; know exactly what you're willing to lose before the close.
